---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Isabel Uribe"
date: "2025-03-31"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#Quad-based parameters
# windows = c(0.7, 2, 5, 10, 20)
windows = 10

targetmz = seq(300, 1800, by = 50)

#LC parameters
# FWHM_sec = c(10.2, 5.6, 3.2, 2.1, 2.0, 1.4)
# experiment = data.frame(SPD = c("015SPD", "030SPD", "060SPD", "100SPD", "200SPD", "500SPD"),
#                         gradient_min = c(88, 44, 21, 11.5, 5.6, 2.2),
#                         FWHM = FWHM_sec/60)

#reset for 2d histogram analysis
FWHM_sec = c(2.0)
experiment = data.frame(SPD = c("200SPD"),
                        gradient_min = c(5.6),
                        FWHM = FWHM_sec/60)
experiment = experiment %>%
  mutate(FWHM_norm = FWHM/gradient_min)

targetrt = seq(0.1, 0.8, by = 0.05)
```


```{r}
#Read in peptide library.
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)

proteome = read_tsv("human_proteome_predicted_CCSz_RT.tsv")

#QUAD Filtering
result_quad = data.frame(matrix(nrow = 0, ncol = 5))

pt_window = c() 
pt_mz = c()

pt_experiment = c()
pt_time = c()

pt_no.prec = c()

subset_ids = list()

#Set up progress bar for iterations over quad isolation windows
n_iter_windows = length(windows)
pb_windows <- winProgressBar(title = "QUAD isolation window iterations", 
                           label = "Percentage Completed", min = 0, max = n_iter_windows, 
                           initial = 0, width = 600L)

for (f in 1:n_iter_windows) {
  for (g in 1:length(targetmz)) {
    
    min_mz = targetmz[g] - (windows[f]/2)
    max_mz = targetmz[g] + (windows[f]/2)
    
    subset_mz = proteome %>%
      filter(PrecursorMz > min_mz & PrecursorMz < max_mz)
        
    for (j in 1:nrow(experiment)) {
      
      spd <- experiment[j, 1]
      gl <- experiment[experiment$SPD == spd, 2]
      fwhm <- experiment[experiment$SPD == spd, 3]
      fwhm_norm = fwhm / gl
      
      for (k in 1:length(targetrt)) {
        
        min_RT = targetrt[k] - (fwhm_norm/2)
        max_RT = targetrt[k] + (fwhm_norm/2)
        
        subset_mz_rt = subset_mz %>%
          filter(Normalized_RT > min_RT & Normalized_RT < max_RT)
        
        no.precursors = nrow(subset_mz_rt)
        
        subset_ids <- c(subset_ids, as.character(subset_mz_rt$id))
        
        pt_window = append(pt_window, windows[f]) 
        pt_mz = append(pt_mz, targetmz[g])
        pt_experiment = append(pt_experiment, spd)
        pt_time = append(pt_time, targetrt[k])
        pt_no.prec = append(pt_no.prec, no.precursors)
        
      }
    }
  }
  pctg_windows = paste(round(f/n_iter_windows * 100, 0), "% completed")
  setWinProgressBar(pb_windows, f, label = pctg_windows)
}
close(pb_windows)

result_quad = data.frame(cbind(pt_window, as.numeric(pt_mz), pt_experiment, 
                                    as.numeric(pt_time), as.numeric(pt_no.prec)))

colnames(result_quad) = c("Isolation_Window", "Target_Mz", "Throughput", "Target_RT", "No_of_Precursors")

library(rlist)
list.save(subset_ids, "quad_ids_10amu_200SPD.rdata")

# write_tsv(result_quad, "chimeric_results_quad.tsv")
```

```{r}
test = result_quad %>%
  group_by(Isolation_Window, Throughput) %>%
  summarise(Total.Prec = sum(as.numeric(No_of_Precursors)))

```
